hook_plan.narration: URGENT investor warning: A major manufacturing choke point is set to impact AI chip supply chains through 2028!
hook_plan.image_description: Close-up of a semiconductor wafer with critical yield defects highlighted by red digital corruption, a cybernetic eye reflects a glitching stock chart, dramatic side lighting, cyberpunk neon, intense focus.

thumbnail_plan.image_description: Hyper-realistic 3D render of a glowing HBM3 stack surrounded by miniature GPU chips on a dark, reflective surface, dramatic backlighting, 8k resolution, centered composition.
thumbnail_plan.reasoning: Highlights the core technical constraint (AI chip bottleneck) with a visually striking, high-tech image, directly appealing to engineers and investors without sensationalism.

title: AI Foundry Squeeze: TSMC to 2028 & Samsung's Shift

segments.text: TSMC faces a critical capacity crunch for advanced nodes, particularly 3nm and 2nm, extending through 2028 due to surging AI demand.
segments.image_prompt: Holographic projection of a detailed semiconductor wafer map showing crowded 3nm/2nm process nodes, overlaid with a digital timeline extending to 2028. Focus on technical data visualization.

segments.text: Key players like Nvidia and Apple are driving this demand for high-bandwidth memory (HBM) and next-gen GPUs, pushing existing foundry limits.
segments.image_prompt: Cybernetic hand interacting with a holographic display showing a dynamic flow chart of HBM and GPU chip production lines, glowing iris reflecting data, serious thought expression.

segments.text: Consequently, Nvidia and Tesla are reportedly engaging Samsung for HBM3 production and advanced packaging solutions to diversify supply chains.
segments.image_prompt: Two stylized corporate logos (Nvidia, Tesla) projected onto a sleek, futuristic Samsung fabrication plant exterior at night, with dramatic cyberpunk neon lighting.

segments.text: Samsung's aggressive CAPEX in HBM and packaging aims to capture this opportunity, despite historical yield challenges impacting their market share.
segments.image_prompt: A complex diagram of HBM wafer bonding process with yield percentages displayed, viewed through smart glasses worn by an analyst with intense focus, cinematic lighting.

segments.text: The global foundry market, propelled by AI, is projected to reach a record US$320 billion in revenue by 2025, emphasizing advanced node importance.
segments.image_prompt: Dynamic 3D bar chart showing global foundry market growth from current to US$320 billion by 2025, with glowing digital lines representing revenue, in a high-tech control room setting.

segments.text: TSMC's dominance faces new pressure, shifting valuation models for leading foundry players into 2028.
segments.image_prompt: Split screen: Left shows a representation of TSMC's advanced factory floor, right shows Samsung's futuristic fab. Both with subtle digital competitive aura. Determination in a glowing iris, reflecting market data.

segments.text: If useful, please like and subscribe!
